schemas.name: Keto Mango Cloud Cake
schemas.description:
A Summer Ritual in Every Bite.
Experience the weightless elegance of our seasonal masterpiece. Designed for the mindful gourmand in Delhi, Gurgaon, and Noida, this 6 inch cloud cake transforms a simple dessert into an intentional, sensory pause.


Keto-Perfect Foundation: A flourless (Gluten-free), low-carb base crafted from a dual-blend of Dark Cacao.


Zero Refined Sugar: Naturally sweetened with Erythritol and Inulin to maintain your ritual's integrity.


The Cloud Crown: A whipped layer of Mascarpone cheese and fresh cream infused with pure vanilla.


The Seasonal Hero: Topped with a single, meticulously sliced Alfonso Mango at the peak of its radiance.


Crafted for NCR: Small-batch production ensuring delivery of the freshest 6-inch cakes across the city.


No hidden oils, artificial flavorings, or high-fructose syrups.
GLUTEN-FREE | NUTS-FREE | CONTAINS DAIRY & EGGS
Orders placed before 4pm will be delivered the same day and orders placed post 4pm will be be ready the next day for delivery/ pickup. Please select your delivery date and slot at cart page.

h3: A Summer Ritual in Every Bite.

schemas.name: Tomato Basil Sauce
schemas.description: Ready-to-Use Gourmet Tomato Sauce. A classic blend of sun ripened tomatoes and fragrant basil, and the goodness of extra virgin olive oil, this sauce is your perfect companion for any meal that requires a tomato base. Be it Shakshuka or pasta or pizza or even morrocan stew or Rajma chawal.

schemas.name: Alphonso Mango Cheesecake
schemas.description:
Minimalist Craft. Intentional Taste.
In the peak of the Indian summer, we return to the basics: light, cream, and the sovereign Alphonso. We believe that true luxury is the removal of the unnecessary. Our 6inch Alphonso Mango Cheesecake is a flourless, textural sanctuary for the palate, a seasonal special that honors the "Art of Rituals".
This is not a routine dessert; it is an Intentional Celebration of the season's finest fruit, delivered with meticulous care across the NCR.
No hidden oils, artificial flavorings, or high-fructose syrups.
NUTS-FREE | CONTAINS GLUTEN, DAIRY & EGGS

open_graph.title: Alphonso Mango Cheesecake
open_graph.description: Our 6inch Alphonso Mango Cheesecake is a flourless, sugar-free sanctuary for the palate, a seasonal special that honors the "Art of Rituals" without the weight of refined ingredients. As we enter the peak of the Indian summer, we return to the basics: light, cream, and the sovereign Alfonso. This is not a routine dessert; it is an Intentional Celebration of the season's finest fruit, delivered with meticulous care across the NCR. Delivering within Delhi, Gurgaon and NCR. No hidden oils, artificial flavorings, or high-fructose syrups. GLUTEN-FREE | NUTS-FREE | CONTAINS DAIRY & EGGS.
